height="30" width="120" x="100" y="785" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Ax6jmUyKDm1l92f0dxil-53" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#C7131F;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="60" y="830" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="90" y="830" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Ax6jmUyKDm1l92f0dxil-54" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#232F3E;" value="Response/Credential Flow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="160" x="100" y="815" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Ax6jmUyKDm1l92f0dxil-55" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="270" width="460" x="400" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Ax6jmUyKDm1l92f0dxil-56" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#232F3E;" value="Architecture Notes" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="160" x="410" y="630" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Ax6jmUyKDm1l92f0dxil-57" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#232F3E;" value="Production Flow:
1. User loads React app from CloudFront/S3
2. User authenticates with Cognito User Pool (gets JWT)
3. Frontend exchanges JWT for AWS credentials via Identity Pool
4. Frontend generates SigV4 presigned WebSocket URL
5. Browser connects to AgentCore via wss:// with auth in URL
6. Bidirectional audio/text streaming with Nova Sonic model

Local Development Flow:
• debug.html connects directly to local Python agent
• Uses ws://localhost:8080/ws (no authentication)
• For testing and debugging only

Key Technologies:
• WebSocket for real-time bidirectional streaming
• SigV4 signing for AWS authentication
• Cognito for user management and AWS credential vending
• Nova Sonic for voice-to-voice AI interactions" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="440" x="410" y="660" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Ax6jmUyKDm1l92f0dxil-58" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#232F3E;" value="AWS AgentCore Voice Agent - Full Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="480" x="420" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Production Flow:
1. User loads React app from CloudFront/S3
2. User authenticates with Cognito User Pool (gets JWT)
3. Frontend exchanges JWT for AWS credentials via Identity Pool
4. Frontend generates SigV4 presigned WebSocket URL
5. Browser connects to AgentCore via wss:// with auth in URL
6. Bidirectional audio/text streaming with Nova Sonic model
Local Development Flow:
• debug.html connects directly to local Python agent
• Uses ws://localhost:8080/ws (no authentication)
• For testing and debugging only
Key Technologies:
• WebSocket for real-time bidirectional streaming
• SigV4 signing for AWS authentication
• Cognito for user management and AWS credential vending
• Nova Sonic for voice-to-voice AI interactions
